video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal F.C. go head-to-head in the ultimate showdown as the UEFA Champions League 2025-26 reaches its grand finale. With European glory on the line, both sides will bring their attacking firepower, tactical intensity, and title ambitions to the biggest stage in club football, setting up a thrilling battle for the coveted crown. Who will rise above the pressure and lift the trophy? Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA Champions League 2025-26 Final, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: Paris Saint-Germain and Arsenal F.C. go head-to-head in the ultimate showdown as the UEFA Champions League 2025-26 reaches its grand finale. Who will rise above the pressure and lift the trophy? Tune in to catch all the action from the UEFA Champions League 2025-26 Final, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: India Women's Tour of England 2026
video_info.shortDescription: India Women's Cricket Team head into the 2nd T20I with momentum after a commanding 38-run victory in the series opener against England Women's Cricket Team at Chelmsford. India recovered brilliantly from early setbacks to post a strong total before producing a disciplined bowling performance to take a 1-0 lead and will look to seal the series, while England will look to bounce back and level on home soil. Find out as we bring you all the action from the 2nd T20I of the India Women’s Tour of England 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
